purpose: Data-only fixtures for the grouped Clean Fast Break exit, stop, cost, failure, sample-size, and promotion rule package. These fixtures preserve blockers; they do not backtest, calculate P&L, prove profitability, choose a real trade, or mark readiness.

rule_summary.entry_reference: SPY CFB 002 has usable starter entry evidence only
rule_summary.exit_rule: required before countable results; exact option exit basis still needs human decision
rule_summary.stop_rule: underlying invalidation required; exact option stop translation still needs human decision
rule_summary.time_exit_rule: required before countable results; exact time values still need human decision
rule_summary.cost_slippage_rule: explicit cost and slippage assumptions required; numeric values still need human decision
rule_summary.failure_diagnosis: specific named reason required for every known blocker
rule_summary.sample_size_gate: required before promotion; threshold still needs human decision
rule_summary.promotion_gate: required before readiness; criteria still need human decision

fixtures.reason: Starter entry evidence is usable for gate testing, but countable results remain blocked until exit, stop, and cost/slippage rules are accepted.
Post-signal option quote is future option data and no fallback contract is allowed.
The selected quote is older than five minutes at setup.
A countable CFB result cannot exist without an accepted option exit rule.
Underlying invalidation exists, but the option stop translation is not accepted.
Raw quotes cannot imply commissions, fees, or slippage.
A single usable reference cannot promote without accepted sample-size thresholds.
Readiness and later stages require accepted promotion criteria.
Known no-trade and blocked cases must not be hidden behind generic skipped or unknown labels.

explicit_non_goals: No checker code is created by this fixture file.
No evidence package row is filled by this fixture file.
No raw Databento files are modified.

No backtest, trade selection, exit simulation, cost model, slippage model, P&L, proof, profitability, readiness, live, broker, order, account, main.py, or Railway behavior is authorized by this fixture file.
